title.en: Ye Tian began to create the fifth layer of the ...

content.en:
The multi-dimensional wisdom light secret technique of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body is of great help to Ye Tian, if the fifth layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body is created, Ye Tian can better comprehend and improve the dimensional rules.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to create the fifth layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body.

The multi-dimensional wisdom light coupled with the analysis of the Yinxuan Illustrated Book allowed Ye Tian to quickly create the fifth layer of the content of the Ka Ye wisdom body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the fifth layer of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, and he easily completed the breakthrough.

In this way, he can cast a more powerful multi-dimensional wisdom light.

"Next, we will strive to create the twelfth dimension of the will peerless, as well as the five realms of multi-dimensional peerlessness and supreme peerlessness. "

Ye Tian planned.

As for the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, then wait for the foundation to improve before trying to create, and at present, it will definitely not be able to reach the sky in one step.

......

The cultivation of the sixth realm, in addition to improving one's cultivation, must also continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension, and the rules of the ninefold dimension are not the limit of the sixth realm, they are just the beginning.

Of course, there are not many sixth realms that have mastered the rules of the ninefold dimension, after all, the rules of the dimension are difficult to comprehend.

Ye Tian bought a lot of information about the sixth realm and the seventh realm, and only then did he know that if the sixth realm wanted to perfectly break through to the seventh realm, he needed to comprehend the rules of the thirty-six 007 dimensions.

Of course, most of the Sixth Realm can't comprehend so many dimensional rules at all, and after they comprehend the twelve or thirteen dimensional rules at most, they will find a way to impact the Seventh Realm, which requires some auxiliary things to impact the Seventh Realm, and these auxiliary things are extremely rare, and any one of them will cause crazy games and even fights among the major forces.

Like ordinary casual cultivation, there is no way to snatch this kind of resource.

Therefore, even in the Upper Domain, it was extremely difficult to break through to the Seventh Realm, unless it was the nine forces that occupied the multi-dimensional territory of the first Nine Sequence, they could easily cultivate a large number of Seventh Realms.

It was still difficult for other forces to cultivate many Seventh Realms, and it took countless long times for a Seventh Realm to be born.

Therefore, there are many invincible sixth realms in the upper domain, but they cannot break through to the seventh realm, and they dare not rush to attack, otherwise the breakthrough will fail, and they will be crippled if they don't die.

The reason why it is difficult for the sixth realm to break through to the seventh realm is that the difficulty lies in how to superimpose the dimensional void in the body one after another, the minimum limit is ninefold, and only if it is above the ninefold can it cause transformation, but the ninefold is too low, and the thirty-six fold is the most perfect, which can easily cause transformation and advance to the seventh realm.

Of course, now you don't dare to superimpose the dimensional void in your body, it will easily cause the dimensional void to collapse, that is, to find death.

"I have a dimensional treasure in my hand, and the level should not be low, enough to support me to comprehend the dimensional rules to seventeen or eighteen, and there is no problem with it, and I will need better treasures or opportunities in the future. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Right now, the most important thing for him is to improve his cultivation.

The cultivation level at the beginning of the Sixth Realm must still be too low, and the cultivation level must be improved.

If it is on the side of the 5000th Territory, it is not necessary to have resources suitable for the Sixth Realm, but there are many on the side of the Upper Domain.

Ye Tian inquired, one of the most suitable resources for the sixth realm to improve cultivation was the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, which was collected from a treasure place in the thirteenth dimension, and it would take a long time to condense a drop of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

And if you want to enter the thirteenth dimension, only a very small number of almost invincible sixth realms can do it, and there are still seventh realms that can do it.

Therefore, the amount of Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid is definitely not too much, and it is undoubtedly very difficult to buy Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

The Heavenly Shu Sect has the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, but it will take a long time to take out a little bit of it for auction, and Ye Tian doesn't know how long he will have to wait before he can hope to obtain the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

But.

After Ye Tian's continuous investigation and exploration of information, he finally knew where to obtain the Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid.

There is the Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid in the Three Thousand Territory, and there is a powerful force there, the Baiye Chamber of Commerce, which has dozens of Seventh Realms, which is much stronger than the Heavenly Shu Sect.

Moreover, the Three Thousand Realms (Abad) are also more prosperous, with a total of one million extradimensional realms, among which there are many forces that are more powerful than the Heavenly Shu Sect.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately went to the Three Thousand Territory.

......

Three Thousand Territory.

Ye Tian arrived here quickly, and the environment here was indeed much better than the territory of 3721.

"The territory of the three thousand is so prosperous, the territory of the two thousand, the territory of the one thousand is so prosperous!"

Ye Tian thought so.

However, it is not easy to enter the more than 2,000 realms, you need a kind of certificate, if you don't have a certificate, you can't get through, unless you can cross the twelfth dimension, you can't get through.

It is said that the existence of the ninth realm is directly blocked, because too many extra-dimensional realms want to go over, resulting in too many extra-dimensional realms over there, and this situation must be suppressed, so this place in the upper domain is directly blocked, and only with a certificate can it be passed.

And there are very few vouchers, only a few forces issue certain vouchers, and the sixth realm has to be robbed.

After all, who doesn't want to go to a territory with a better cultivation environment to cultivate? Naturally, they are eager to obtain a certificate.

It's just that the environment is better over there, and even if you don't go, there is hope to break through to the seventh or even eighth realm here.

It's just that the powerhouses who have reached the eighth realm have all gone to the better territory of the upper realm, and they will not stay here.

Three Thousand Territory.

Ye Tian soon came to the Baiye Chamber of Commerce and wanted to buy the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

There is indeed Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid here, but if you want to be eligible to purchase it, you must complete some tasks issued by the Hundred Leaf Chamber of Commerce in order to obtain the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid.

Ye Tian immediately understood that the Hundred Leaves Chamber of Commerce was using the Heavenly Marrow Golden Liquid to attract a group of Sixth Realms to complete tasks for them and solve some minor troubles.

And these tasks must not be simple, otherwise the Sixth Realm of other realms will definitely come to buy the Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid, where will it be his turn!

The Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid could not supply too much of the Sixth Realm, so it must be extremely restrictive.

Ye Tian checked these tasks, and immediately gasped, no wonder there was still Heavenly Marrow Gold Liquid sold, it was really that these tasks were too perverted and too difficult.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of the difficulty of these tasks, and he quickly picked one of them.

Clean up the multi-dimensional life of the twelfth dimension Jin Yuanhai, mission requirements: kill one hundred sixth-realm multi-dimensional lifeforms

As the sixth realm, it is necessary to kill a hundred heads of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, this is to be desperate, in case you encounter the sixth realm of incomparable demons, then you will die.

Many Sixth Realms just want to buy some resources, why do they have to work hard, they would rather cultivate slower than take risks!

But this task was not difficult for Ye Tian, so he took this task next.
